code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn bytes_eq(_ s: String, _ a: Int, _ alen: Int, _ t: String, _ b: Int, _ blen: Int) -> Bool
  if alen != blen
    false
  else
    mut k = 0
    mut eq = true
    while k < alen and eq
      if byte_of(s, a + k) != byte_of(t, b + k)
        eq = false
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    eq
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut starts: List<Int> = []
mut lens: List<Int> = []
mut counts: List<Int> = []
mut num_tokens = 0
mut best_idx = -1
mut best_count = 0

mut i = 0
while i < n
  while i < n and is_ws(byte_of(input, i))
    i = i + 1
  end
  if i < n
    let tstart = i
    while i < n and not is_ws(byte_of(input, i))
      i = i + 1
    end
    let tlen = i - tstart

    mut found = -1
    mut j = 0
    while j < num_tokens and found < 0
      let s = at(starts, j)
      let l = at(lens, j)
      if bytes_eq(input, s, l, input, tstart, tlen)
        found = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end

    if found < 0
      starts = list.push(starts, tstart)
      lens = list.push(lens, tlen)
      counts = list.push(counts, 1)
      let new_idx = num_tokens
      num_tokens = num_tokens + 1
      if 1 > best_count
        best_count = 1
        best_idx = new_idx
      end
    else
      mut new_counts: List<Int> = []
      mut k = 0
      mut new_val = 0
      while k < num_tokens
        if k == found
          let v = at(counts, k) + 1
          new_counts = list.push(new_counts, v)
          new_val = v
        else
          new_counts = list.push(new_counts, at(counts, k))
        end
        k = k + 1
      end
      counts = new_counts
      if new_val > best_count
        best_count = new_val
        best_idx = found
      end
    end
  end
end

if best_idx < 0
  println("top==0")
else
  let s = at(starts, best_idx)
  let l = at(lens, best_idx)
  let tok = string.substring(input, s, s + l)
  println("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
end
